name: faker-ai
description: MEOK AI Labs — Generate realistic fake test data for development and testing.

tools.name: generate_fake_data
tools.description: Generate fake data of a specified type (person, company, address, email, phone). Returns 1-50 records.

tools.name: generate_profile
tools.description: Generate a complete fake user profile with name, contact, address, employment, and bio.

tools.name: generate_address
tools.description: Generate realistic fake addresses with street, city, postcode, and country.

tools.name: generate_company
tools.description: Generate a fake company with name, industry, address, registration, and financial details.

tools.name: generate_dataset
tools.description: Generate a tabular fake dataset with specified columns. Supports: name, email, age, phone, city, company, date, amount.
